productName: Stinger Sweets Grape Soda .5g 2pk - Grape soda - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Grape Soda flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of grape, lavender, and citrus, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
